name: Master Aurora the Frost-Veiled
dialogue: So. Brisa, Glacien, and Tindra all stepped aside.
Few do. Most freeze long before they reach this hall — the cold here remembers every winter the world has known.
I founded the Frost Veil after the long thaw, when even the snow was forgetting itself.
Show me what you carried through the storm. Don't waste my breath.
preBattleLine: Aurora rises. The dojo lanterns dim. Frost flowers bloom across every wooden beam.
postDefeatDialogue: Aurora bows once, the lanterns flaring back to gold.
"You walk through the Veil now. The mountain knows your name."
She sets her hand on your shoulder. The cold withdraws.
